===={{aniseries|JN}}====
Jupiter reappeared in ''[[JNS01|The Arceus Chronicles (Part 1)]]'' through ''[[JNS04|The Arceus Chronicles (Part 4)]]'', taking part in Team Galactic's plan to bring back Cyrus. For this purpose, Team Galactic acquired {{p|Arceus}}'s [[Flame Plate]] and a {{p|Heatran}}, which were meant to power a device that would open a gate to the world that Cyrus had disappeared to. The operation, however, experienced a setback when the energy cannon exploded and Heatran went on a rampage. Jupiter and the other Commanders later faced Ash and his friends in order to stop them from interfering with them, but they were ultimately defeated and captured by Cynthia and later arrested by [[Officer Jenny]], ending their plan in a failure.
